nasb.text: That place was called the valley of Eshcol, because of the cluster which the sons of Israel cut down from there.

esv.text: That place was called the Valley of Eshcol, because of the cluster that the people of Israel cut down from there.

cnv.text: 因為以色列人從那裡砍來的那掛葡萄，所以那地方叫作以實各谷。

ccb.text: 因为他们在那里砍了一串葡萄，所以就称那地方为以实各谷。
